boundaryTests.scenario: Future same-year ISO record excluded by new gate
Cross-year boundary — prior year record included
boundaryTests.expected: true — INCLUDED (correct, lexicographic works cross-year for ISO)

boundaryTests.scenario: OLD BUG: future ISO vs YYYYMMDD — was incorrectly included
boundaryTests.expected: SHOULD BE false but was true — confirms the bug
boundaryTests.note: This comparison no longer occurs after P29F-Repair; gate uses ISO asOfIso

boundaryTests.scenario: YYYYMMDD asOf input normalized to ISO
boundaryTests.expected: false — correctly excluded even when asOf passed as YYYYMMDD

boundaryTests.scenario: Invalid date format throws — gate bypass prevention
No asOf (undefined) — gate disabled, all records returned
boundaryTests.expected: asOfIso = null; Prisma where clause has no date filter
boundaryTests.note: Standard backtest behavior for full-history analysis
